title: JPMorgan Chase Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights
text: JPMorgan Chase reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $16.5 billion, up 13% year over year, and diluted EPS of $5.94. Reported revenue was $49.8 billion, while managed revenue was $50.5 billion, up 10% year over year. Net interest income was $25.5 billion, up 9%, and noninterest revenue was $25.1 billion, up 11%. The firm produced a 19% return on common equity and 23% return on tangible common equity. Commercial & Investment Bank revenue rose 19%, with investment banking fees up 28% and markets revenue up 20%, including strength in both fixed income and equity markets. Consumer & Community Banking revenue increased 7%, and Asset & Wealth Management revenue increased 11%, with assets under management of $4.8 trillion. JPMorgan Chase also reported a standardized CET1 capital ratio of 14.3%, $291 billion of CET1 capital, and $1.5 trillion of cash and marketable securities.
